choice: Three buckets: taxable, tax-deferred (Traditional 401(k)/IRA), and tax-free (Roth) — exactly the three the withdrawal engine already sources from in fe56f1d6. Carry the enum so HSA/529/etc. can be added later, but keep only these three in v1.
rationale: fe56f1d6 fixed the sourcing order as taxable → tax-deferred → Roth and forces RMDs from tax-deferred only, so the domain must distinguish precisely these three treatments. Specialty accounts (HSA, 529, taxable-but-tax-advantaged munis) carry their own rules that are out of v1's tax scope (dc489f83 caps modeling at bracketed net amounts), so they'd add tax-logic without v1 payoff.
